caption: A graphic titled "Digital Problem-Solving Initiative" is displayed against a white background. The graphic is divided into a four-quadrant grid of colors. The top-left quadrant is yellow and contains a black icon of a laptop. The top-right quadrant is yellow and features a large black question mark. Below these is a horizontal black bar containing the white text "Digital Problem-Solving Initiative". The bottom-left quadrant is orange and shows a black icon of a lightbulb with radiating lines. The bottom-right quadrant is pink and depicts a black icon of three stylized people. Across the sequence of frames, the image remains completely static, with no changes to the layout, colors, icons, or text.
